extraction.one_line_summary: CARAPAZ Richard won from the breakaway by 48-49 seconds as ROGLIC Primoz attacked the GC group, taking 1:49 from EVENEPOEL Remco on the final steep finish.
tactical_patterns: ROGLIC Primoz exploited 15% finish gradients to take 1:49 from EVENEPOEL Remco, proving altitude weakness in red jersey.
EVENEPOEL Remco suffered mechanical on penultimate climb then cracked on final kilometer, first vulnerability shown after week of dominance.
Breakaway took 90 minutes to establish despite only 100-mile stage, indicating GC teams blocked early moves aggressively.
MAS Enrique completely detached trying to match ROGLIC attack, losing 2:43 total, exposing inability to respond on super-steep finishes.

rider_signals.CARAPAZ Richard: positive: Successfully defended breakaway on brutal 15% finish while GC battle raged, showing exceptional closing speed on steep gradients
rider_signals.ROGLIČ Primož: positive: First major GC attack took nearly two minutes from race leader, exploiting mechanical and steep finish perfectly
rider_signals.EVENEPOEL Remco: negative: Lost 1:49 after mechanical disruption and cracked on 15% gradients, first sign altitude/extreme gradients expose weakness
rider_signals.LÓPEZ Miguel Ángel: positive: Took six-second time bonus finishing with ROGLIC, showing GC revival after earlier struggles
rider_signals.MAS Enrique: negative: Completely unable to respond to ROGLIC acceleration, lost 2:43, confirming limited explosive climbing capacity
rider_signals.RODRÍGUEZ Carlos: positive: Finished strongly in GC group, Spanish national champion showing consistent podium form
